title: Mock Game Histories
description: Generated game histories per mock player. Each game's nine frameScores were drawn from a per-Fargo-bracket distribution tuned so the natural sum-of-9 lands within ±2 of the bracket mean. For Efren-variant games, each drawn score is multiplied by (1 - bracket_penalty) and rounded stochastically — preserves expected value, knocks ~5% off C-tier totals up to ~13% off pro-tier totals. Per-player RNG is a stable FNV-1a hash of displayName, so re-running the exporter produces byte-identical output.

playerDisplayName.description: Resolves to a player in mock-players.json.

playerFargoRating.description: Denormalized for convenience; matches mock-players.json fargoRating for the same displayName.

venueName.description: Real-world venue name. 'Carey's Home Table' is dev-only.

daysAgo.description: Days before the seed-time 'now' that the game was played. Window 0–90 days.

minutesOffset.description: Additional minutes subtracted from now after the days offset, so games scatter throughout the day.

frameScores.description: Per-frame scores. Exactly 9 values, each in [0, 11]. Sum equals totalScore.
